filesystem.description: Read and write files in the workspace. No credentials required. Enables Copilot to browse, read, and edit repo files directly.

github.description: Search issues, manage PRs, read other repos. Requires a GitHub personal access token in GITHUB_TOKEN env var.

fetch.description: Fetch any public URL for documentation lookups. No credentials required, but disabled by default to avoid unintended network access.

firecrawl.description: Deep web crawling and scraping for research. Requires a Firecrawl API key (https://firecrawl.dev).

postgres.description: Explore and query a PostgreSQL / Supabase database. Requires POSTGRES_CONNECTION_STRING env var.

sqlite.description: Query the local SQLite database (dev.db) used by the simulation. No credentials needed — just enable and point at your db file.

memory.description: Persistent key-value memory for Copilot across sessions. No credentials required for the local variant.

sequential-thinking.description: Encourages step-by-step reasoning before generating code. Helps with complex architectural decisions. No credentials required.

brave-search.description: Web search via Brave Search API. Requires a free BRAVE_API_KEY (https://api.search.brave.com).

everart.description: AI image generation for game sprites and assets. Requires an EverArt API key.
